basic_details.job_title: DCPU Krishnagiri Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Krishnagiri (DCPU Krishnagiri)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Krishnagiri (DCPU Krishnagiri) Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DCPU Krishnagiri. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DCPU Krishnagiri Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: 12th Pass or equivalent from a recognized board.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Krishnagiri Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://krishnagiri.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Krishnagiri Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notificatio

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Krishnagiri Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is passing the 12th standard or an equivalent examination from a recognized board.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post is 42 years, as of 1st June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and download the application form from the official website of District Child Protection Unit Krishnagiri: https://krishnagiri.nic.in.
